message:
fix: add keyboard navigation to 3 list-style cards (#8902)

Adds roving-tabindex keyboard navigation to clickable list items in
NetworkOverview (Top Namespaces), KustomizationStatus (kustomizations
list), and OperatorStatus (operators list). Each item now exposes:

- role="button" + tabIndex=0 for screen readers and Tab traversal
- Enter/Space to activate (drill-down)
- ArrowUp/ArrowDown to move focus between siblings
- Home/End to jump to first/last item
- focus-visible:ring-2 ring-cyan-400 outline for visibility

Container <div>s gain role="list" so the list semantics are exposed.
Existing onClick + cursor + hover behavior is unchanged for mouse users.

Addresses #8883

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
